customer_vision: Lamna needs to pass a HIPAA audit in Q3 2026. The cloud foundation is the enabler. Very compliance-driven engagement.
business_objectives: Entra ID fully deployed with MFA and PIM
success_criteria: HIPAA policy initiative showing 95%+ compliance in Defender for Cloud
PHI data classified and protected in Purview
risks: Legacy on-premises AD has 12 years of accumulated technical debt
pitfalls: Previous cloud vendor was AWS — some stakeholder reluctance toward Azure
key_decisions: Defender for Cloud HIPAA initiative over custom policy
Entra ID cloud-only for new accounts; hybrid for legacy
delivery_notes: HIPAA audit is the North Star. Every decision should be framed around audit readiness.
